summary: Iteration 51 — Validated the NEW Plano→Aprovar→Executar architectural flow. Backend: 11/11 pytest cases PASS covering plan creation (rascunho default), rejection of rascunho plans on POST /api/inspecoes (400), PATCH /aprovar transition, checklist copy from plan (3/5/100 perguntas), plano metadata preservation (plano_id/plano_nome/plano_versao), missing plano_id → 422 with field in loc, GET /por-ativo returns ONLY 'aprovado' plans, aprovar of empty plan → 400, and Ronda-mode auto-conclusion. Frontend: Playwright verified — /admin/templates renders status badges (Aprovado/rascunho/Ativo), 'Aprovar' button appears only on non-approved plans with perguntas (5 of 7 cards); Nova Inspeção modal on /inspecoes now shows a 'Planos Aprovados (N)' list of selectable plan cards after ativo selection (verified 2 approved plans for AV-01) — hardcoded Mecânica/Elétrica/Lubrificação tabs are GONE.

issues: Legacy plans in DB with status='ativo' (uppercase 'Ativo' badge) still show an 'Aprovar' button — they are neither 'aprovado' nor 'rascunho'. GET /por-ativo filter excludes them (status must be 'aprovado'), so they are effectively non-executable. Consider a data migration to convert legacy status='ativo' to 'aprovado' OR to 'rascunho', or block execution of 'ativo' plans explicitly. Currently the user can approve them, which is the intended path.

action_items: Consider a one-off migration to normalize legacy PlanoInspecao documents that still have status='ativo' into either 'aprovado' or 'rascunho' — currently they are visible in /admin/templates as 'Ativo' badge but excluded from /por-ativo (executable) because that endpoint filters status=='aprovado'. Not blocking the new flow.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:1067-1085 planos_por_ativo: filter for generic plans uses `ativo_id: {"$in": [None, ""]}` — good. But the initial by-asset query on line 1067 uses `"ativo_id": ativo_id` and status=='aprovado', which is exactly the spec. OK.
server.py:1096 aprovar_plano checks `plano.get('perguntas')` truthy — this correctly rejects [] and None. OK.

server.py:1231 create_inspecao: strict status check `!= 'aprovado'` — this MEANS legacy plans with status='ativo' cannot be executed even though they appear in /admin/templates. The 'Aprovar' button on legacy 'ativo' plans is the sane escape hatch. Consider documenting.

server.py:1241 correctly raises 400 for plans without perguntas — however, since aprovar_plano ALREADY rejects empty plans (line 1096), this branch should be unreachable in production. Keep as defensive guard.
models.py:275 InspecaoCreate.plano_id is str (required) — validated: missing field returns 422 with plano_id in loc. OK.
App.js:1476-1480 empty-state message 'O PCM precisa criar e aprovar planos antes de executar inspeções' is clear and user-friendly. OK.

App.js:6781 conditional `!isAprovado && (t.perguntas || []).length > 0` correctly gates the 'Aprovar' button. Note that legacy status='ativo' plans DO satisfy !isAprovado, so 'Aprovar' is offered — matches migration path.

server.py:990-1010 (from iteration 50 flag) update_plano_inspecao STILL only supports updating 'nome' and 'perguntas'. Editing status/tipo/ativo_id/disciplina from the UI via PUT will be silently dropped. If a user edits a plan and expects to change tipo/disciplina, it will fail silently. HIGH priority to fix — this is now more critical because the flow depends on plans being editable to iterate before approval.
seed_data_creation: 9 TEST_ITER51_* plans created via pytest fixture; teardown deletes them via DELETE /api/planos-inspecao/{id}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 confirms end-to-end Plano→Aprovar→Executar architecture works exactly per spec: (1) POST /api/inspecoes REQUIRES plano_id (422 if missing, 400 if plan not 'aprovado'); (2) Execution copies checklist from plan perguntas (verified with 3, 5, 100 items) — no generic fallback exists; (3) plano_id/plano_nome/plano_versao are persisted on the execution doc; (4) GET /planos-inspecao/por-ativo/{ativo_id} filters strictly to status=='aprovado' — verified rascunho plan does NOT appear; (5) Ronda mode (checklist with 'conforme' values in POST body) auto-concludes to status='concluida', resultado='conforme', data_conclusao set. FRONTEND: /admin/templates shows badges, 'Aprovar' button on non-approved plans; ModalNovaInspecao renders 'Planos Aprovados (N)' list of plan cards after ativo selection — no more hardcoded Mecânica/Elétrica/Lubrificação tabs. ONE LEGACY WARNING: DB contains plans with status='ativo' (legacy value); they appear in /admin/templates but not in /por-ativo. Users must approve them via the 'Aprovar' button (which transitions to 'aprovado'). CARRY-OVER FROM ITER 50: PUT /api/planos-inspecao/{id} still ignores tipo/ativo_id/disciplina/status/versao updates — becoming more critical with the new flow.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration. The architectural rewrite is correctly implemented on both backend and frontend. Only minor observation: legacy 'ativo' status plans persist in DB from before the rewrite; the design correctly routes them through the 'Aprovar' button UI to migrate them to 'aprovado'.
